calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Howard Olsen, Esq., for the Plaintiff CSV HOSPITALITY MANAGEMENT LLC.
Raushanah Lewis sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant LORIN FREIRSON.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The rental agreement is cnaceled. The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 64 Turk Street, #417, San Francisco, CA 94102.
Judgment is for possession only.
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line 7
Judge Pro Tem: Marte Bassi, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff CSV Hospitality Management is present. Represented by Roshana Lewis
Attorney Howard Olsen for the plaintiff.
Defendant Lorin Freirson is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Jan. 26, 2014 remains on calendar. (501/jpt)
